'''dhanate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kingward|kingward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kingward|kingward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dhanate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dhanate|dhanate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhanatesher|dhanatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhanatesherĂ«m|dhanatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhanatero|dhanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhanateshĂ«|dhanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhanateshĂ«m|dhanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhanatero|gokidhanatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhanateshĂ«|gokidhanateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhanateshĂ«m|gokidhanateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhanankerom|godhanankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhanankeshĂ«|godhanankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhanankeshĂ«m|godhanankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhanankeya|godhanankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhanaterom|dhanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhanatemu|dhanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhanateya|dhanateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhanaterom|gokidhanaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhanatemu|gokidhanatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhanateya|gokidhanateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhananate|dhananate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhananatesher|dhananatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhananatesherĂ«m|dhananatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhananatero|dhananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhananateshĂ«|dhananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhananateshĂ«m|dhananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhananatero|gokidhananatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhananateshĂ«|gokidhananateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhananateshĂ«m|gokidhananateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhananankerom|godhananankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhananankeshĂ«|godhananankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhananankeshĂ«m|godhananankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhananankeya|godhananankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhananaterom|dhananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhananatemu|dhananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhananateya|dhananateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhananaterom|gokidhananaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhananatemu|gokidhananatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhananateya|gokidhananateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠte|dhĂŠnĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠtesher|dhĂŠnĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠnĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠtero|dhĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠnĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠnĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠnĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠnĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠnĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠnĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠnĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠnĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠterom|dhĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠtemu|dhĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠnĂŠteya|dhĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠnĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠnĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠnĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠnĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠnĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠnĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafnafte|dhafnafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafnaftesher|dhafnaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafnaftesherĂ«m|dhafnaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafnaftero|dhafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafnafteshĂ«|dhafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafnafteshĂ«m|dhafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafnaftero|gokidhafnaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafnafteshĂ«|gokidhafnafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafnafteshĂ«m|gokidhafnafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafnafnkerom|godhafnafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafnafnkeshĂ«|godhafnafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafnafnkeshĂ«m|godhafnafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafnafnkeya|godhafnafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafnafterom|dhafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafnaftemu|dhafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafnafteya|dhafnafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafnafterom|gokidhafnafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafnaftemu|gokidhafnaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafnafteya|gokidhafnafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
